name: Maple Cream Coffee Treat
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In an ungreased 13 x 9-inch pan, combine brown sugar, nuts, syrup, and 1/4 cup melted margarine. Spread evenly in the bottom of the pan.
3. In a small bowl, blend cream cheese, powdered sugar, and 2 tbsp softened margarine until smooth. Stir in coconut.
4. Separate dough into 20 biscuits. Roll each to a 4-inch circle.
5. Spoon a tablespoon of the cream cheese mixture down the center of each circle, stopping 1/4-inch from the edge.
6. Fold the sides of the dough over the filling, forming finger-shaped rolls. Arrange the rolls in two rows of 10 in the pan, seam side down.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until deeply golden brown. Allow to cool for 3 to 5 minutes before serving. Invert onto foil, waxed paper, or a serving platter.
